'''Kitalic Nirasic''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Svivreni]] miner and [[Mining/Legends|mining]] manager.

Nirasic studied in several colleges throughout the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], including the [[Svivren Xenomineralogy Institute]]. Later, he worked in most areas of mining in several planets, including his native [[Svivren]], [[Af'El/Legends|Af'El]] and [[Vactooine]], commonly combining philanthropy and profitability.

Nirasic eventually went to [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]] and found out that the [[Offworld Mining Corporation|Offworld Corporation]] controlled the local mining. Nirasic created [[Southern Bandomeer Consolidated]] to become its competitor and wrestle with Offworld, while at the same time improving the status of the miners.
